recent.task: Sent calibration Email 1 to 3 marketing agencies: Click Click Media, OMG, Next&Co. All Pipeline → Outreach Active. WebAlive replaced with Next&Co (overlap risk). Pre-flight checklist operational. Predictions recorded.
Built gmail_auth.py shared auth layer (eliminates recurring token expiry). Replaced Cinderellas (invalid email) with Sydney Office Clean in calibration. 3 agency Email 1 drafts pending research.

Created Atlas Learning Framework — systematic self-improvement methodology. Added 'Evidence before optimisation' as SOUL directive #11. Email 2 drafts prepared (variable-isolated). CRM now self-updating.
Reorganized vault: deleted duplicate Wikilinks.md, rewrote SOUL.md in caveman style (-27% tokens), created research/ directory with 14 files and 6 scripts moved from root
Designed 7-stage prospect lifecycle (first principles). Built New → Outreach Active automation. Backfilled 7 calibration prospects. CRM now reflects reality.
Added 'Campaign Complete' Pipeline stage to Airtable Prospects — campaign end ≠ relationship end now represented in CRM
Recorded strategic decision: Calibration outreach adopted as living system — campaign end ≠ relationship end, context-awareness overrides timetables, data trumps assumptions
Batch 2 sent: Cinderellas, Kleena Cleaners, Performance Cleaning. 7 of 10 calibration emails now live. Researching Batch 3 (agencies).
